summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Volume Bot Admin Panel (Iteration 4). All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: token mint config, cost calculator, wallet generation, distribute/collect SOL buttons, and progress bars - all working correctly.

test_classes: TestAdminLoginEnhanced (2 tests): login success, wrong password 401
TestBotStatusNewFields (2 tests): status returns all new config fields (token_mint, target_volume_sol, target_makers, trade_interval_min/max, min/max_sol_per_trade, slippage_bps), auth check
TestBotConfigNewFields (6 tests): update token_mint, target_volume_sol, target_makers, trade_intervals, sol_per_trade, auth check
TestCostCalculator (3 tests): returns all fields (trades_per_day, gas_cost_sol, slippage_cost_sol, total_daily_cost_sol, sol_needed_minimum), costs update with config change, auth check
TestWalletGeneration (3 tests): generate wallets returns public keys, default values work, auth check
TestWalletMainSetting (2 tests): set main wallet, auth check
TestWalletListWithIsMain (1 test): wallets have is_main field
TestDistributeSol (2 tests): distribute returns proper structure, auth check
TestCollectSol (2 tests): collect returns proper structure, auth check
TestAllEndpointsAuth (1 test): all 12 admin endpoints return 401 without auth

stats_row.volume_dzienny: Shows daily volume with progress bar (0.00 / 10 SOL)
stats_row.makers: Shows makers count with progress bar (0 / 20)

config_panel.token_mint_address: WORKING - editable field with current token address

cost_calculator.slippage_cost: Shows '0.3 SOL' (updates to 1.5 SOL when volume=50)
cost_calculator.updates_on_config_change: VERIFIED - slippage changed from 0.3 to 1.5 SOL when volume changed from 10 to 50

admin_dashboard.transaction_log: Shows 'Log Transakcji (0)' - empty when bot not running

critical_code_review_comments: All new config fields (token_mint, target_volume_sol, target_makers, trade_interval_min/max, min/max_sol_per_trade) properly implemented
Cost calculator correctly computes estimates based on current config and updates dynamically
Wallet generation creates real Solana keypairs and stores them in MongoDB
Distribute/Collect SOL endpoints properly structured (actual transactions require funded wallets)
Progress bars for daily volume and makers targets working correctly
All admin endpoints properly protected with x-admin-password header
UI is in Polish language (consistent with previous iteration)
seed_data_creation: Generated test wallets during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Volume Bot Admin Panel fully tested. New features verified: token_mint config field, cost calculator (/api/admin/bot/costs), wallet generation (/api/admin/wallets/generate), distribute/collect SOL endpoints, progress bars for daily targets. All 25 backend tests pass. Frontend shows all new UI elements correctly. Note: Actual blockchain transactions (distribute/collect) require funded wallets - API structure tested but transactions fail due to no funds (expected behavior).
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All enhanced features working as expected.
